rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" applied to a research prose excerpt is an unambiguous writing-polish directive: improve sentence clarity, word choice, register consistency, and paragraph flow without altering content or structure. This is the load-bearing responsibility; failure to produce clean prose invalidates the delegation.
